content:
Save your completed Week 4 Weekly Writing Warm-Up using the proper naming convention.
Estimated Time for Completion
The estimated time to complete this activity is 5 minutes.

Completion
The naming convention is ENG101_wk#_warm_up_firstintiallastname_date—for example, ENG101_wk4_warm_up_jsmith_mmddyyyy.
Submit the Week 4 Weekly Writing Warm-Up by the end of the week. See the video below to review the process.



After you submit your assignment, click Next to complete the Week 4 Discussion.


Points
100
